# Intentionally vulnerable versions — used by e2e Docker tests
# GHSA-8q59-q68h-6hv4: PyYAML < 6.0, arbitrary code execution via yaml.load()
PyYAML==5.3.1
# GHSA-j8r2-6x86-q33q: requests < 2.31.0, credentials leaked on redirect
requests==2.27.0
# GHSA-q2q7-5pp4-w6pg: urllib3 < 1.26.5, header injection via CRLF
urllib3==1.24.1
# GHSA-v8gr-m533-ghj9: cryptography < 39.0.1, RSA decryption oracle (Bleichenbacher)
cryptography==3.3.2
